theme: The destination brief nobody hands us — and the one we actually recommend

linkedin.text:
Every procurement brief we receive has the same five cities on it.

And I get it — they're safe, they're deliverable, and the CFO won't ask questions.

But here's the thing 130+ destinations and 1,500+ events have shown us:

The incentive trips that drive actual retention, actual pipeline conversations, actual culture-shift aren't the ones that checked the obvious boxes.

They're the ones where the group landed somewhere they'd never have chosen themselves — and the first 10 minutes rewired how they saw each other.

We had a sales team of 200 land in a destination most of them couldn't have found on a map. By night two, the company's top performers were having the kind of honest conversations with leadership that four years of town halls hadn't produced.

Destination is strategy. Not logistics.

Most event agencies treat the venue as a backdrop. We treat it as the first message the company sends to its people.

We've placed 25,000+ participants across 130+ destinations over 16 years. The question I'd push back on isn't 'where's on budget?' — it's 'what do you want people to feel about the company when they land?'

If you're currently briefing an incentive or retreat for the next six months, I'd genuinely enjoy talking through the destination strategy before the shortlist gets locked. DM me.

instagram.text:
Everyone books Barcelona. Everyone books Dubai.

Want to know the destinations that make 500-person groups go completely silent the moment they arrive? 👇

After 130+ destinations and 1,500+ events, we know the ones that hit different.

Not because they're exotic. Because they're precisely matched — to the group size, the company culture, the season, the story you're trying to tell.

The destination nobody pitches is almost always the one nobody forgets.

DM us 'DESTINATIONS' and we'll send you 3 that nobody on your team has thought of yet.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateTravel #MICE #TeamRetreat #EventPlanning #CorporateEvents #DestinationInspiration #B2BTravel #UproductionEvents #HiddenGems

facebook.text:
Every HR director we speak to has the same shortlist: Barcelona, Dubai, Lisbon, Amsterdam, Tulum.

Nothing wrong with that list.

But after building incentive trips across 130+ destinations, the ones teams talk about for years? Almost never on the shortlist.

It's the cliffside dinner in a country they'd never thought to visit. The private island transfer that made everyone forget they work together 50 weeks a year. The destination nobody pitched — that we did.

We've moved 25,000+ participants through 16 years of 'you'll just have to trust us on this one.'

They always do. And they always come back.

Planning an incentive trip or company retreat? Send us a message — we'll show you three destinations your team hasn't considered yet.

image_prompt: Aerial drone shot of a long wooden dinner table set for 200 people on a clifftop terrace overlooking a turquoise fjord at golden hour, waitstaff in white uniforms moving between guests, mountains reflected in the water far below, no visible technology.
